# permitio_user (Data Source)

Fetches a user from the Permit.io directory. This data source allows you to retrieve information about a user by their key.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Fetch a user by their key
data "permitio_user" "example" {
  key = "user@example.com"
}

# Use the user data in other resources
resource "permitio_role_assignment" "admin" {
  user   = data.permitio_user.example.key
  role   = "admin"
  tenant = "default"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) User key identifier

### Read-Only

- `attributes` (String) Custom user attributes as JSON string
- `email` (String) User's email address
- `environment_id` (String) Environment ID
- `first_name` (String) User's first name
- `id` (String) Unique user ID
- `last_name` (String) User's last name
- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID
- `project_id` (String) Project ID
